title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. Layers: (1) prevFgHint early capture before EnsureCdpConnection, (2) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) not SW_MINIMIZE(6), (3) ForceForegroundWindow(AttachThreadInput) replacing silent-fail SetForegroundWindowRaw, (4) StartFocusWatchdog 200ms monitor-only during entire ask op, (5) RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync at each action boundary, (6) FocuslessWarningOverlay + ActionApi.OnFocusStealer prop stamp. MANDATORY: all restore paths must go through InputReadiness pipeline -- standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness is FORBIDDEN. LIVING DOCUMENT: update this skill as each focus-theft incident is investigated and resolved.
steps: 0. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe() -- OnProbeSuccess fires zoom+auto-hack. Standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness FORBIDDEN (except RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync inner loop).
1. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only (insert/send/attach/wait-response). Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.
5. Action boundary restore: GuardCdpFocusTheft / LogRestoreFocus -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
6. RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: IME+cursor snapshot -> ForceForegroundWindow loop -> OnFocusStealer(AutoBugReport+overlay) -> restore on success
8. [TODO] FireAutoHeal on 5s restore timeout: AutoBugReport(unrecoverable) + FireAutoHeal(focus-theft, chromeHwnd)

11. [TODO] DismissDialogAsync: add 동의 to button text match + call before send (not only during response poll). Gemini file-attach consent popup blocks editor before send -- currently only dismissed during response polling (CdpClient.AiHelpers.cs:715)
author: claude
